tagline: Automated Property Owner Outreach, Built to Fill Your Acquisition Pipeline
problem_summary: BayfordBridge holds a list of 6,000 property owners with no systematic way to reach them at scale. Without enrichment or segmentation, every outreach attempt is a generic blast that fails to speak to the individual owner's situation. Qualified sellers slip through the cracks because there is no automated follow-up or meeting booking system in place. The result is a high-value list sitting idle while acquisition opportunities go untapped.
solution_summary: AP Systems will build a full-stack outreach automation that enriches, scores, and segments the 6,000 contacts by acquisition priority using real property data and Claude AI. Five targeted email sequences will be loaded into Instantly, each one tailored to a specific owner profile, and deployed with native warmup and sending controls. Every reply is caught by an N8N webhook, classified by Claude, and surfaced to your reply team with a suggested response to keep a human touch on every conversation. The result is a pipeline that generates qualified meeting bookings at scale while your team maintains personal control over replies.
pain_points: Reaching 6,000 property owners manually is impossible to do at any meaningful scale.
Without segmentation, every owner receives the same generic message, destroying conversion rates before the campaign even starts.
Qualified leads slip through with no automated follow-up or meeting booking system to capture them.
There is no visibility into who has been contacted, who replied, and who is ready to sell.
how_it_works: Upload the 6,000-contact list. We clean it and enrich every record with property data (lot size, ownership duration, assessed value) using Regrid
Claude AI scores each lead 0-100 and assigns them to one of five segments: Vacant Land, Inherited Property, Long-Term Holders, Large Underutilized Lots, and Out-of-State Owners
Five tailored email sequences are loaded into Instantly. Each sequence speaks directly to that segment's situation and motivation to sell
Instantly handles sending with built-in warmup, daily limits, and A/Z testing to maximize deliverability and open rates

Every reply triggers an N8N webhook. Claude reads it, classifies the intent, and surfaces it to your reply team with a suggested response. The team sends the reply, and interested owners receive a Calendly booking link.
A re-engagement workflow runs every 14 days to follow up with leads who went cold, keeping the pipeline active without manual effort
what_is_included: Property list enrichment for up to 6,000 contacts using Regrid data
AI-powered lead scoring (0-100) and segmentation into 5 priority tiers
5 Instantly email sequences with copy tailored per segment
N8N reply triage workflow with AI-suggested responses for your team
Calendly integration for automated meeting booking

tool_costs.purpose: Email campaign management, warmup, A/Z testing, reply inbox
7 to 10 domains recommended. Each domain: 5 inboxes x 30 msgs/day = 150 emails/day. 7 domains = 1,050 emails/day. 10 domains = 1,500 emails/day.
One-time bulk property data enrichment for 6,000 contacts
Workflow automation for reply handling, routing, and re-engagement
Meeting booking integration for qualified leads

contrast_rows.before: Manually reaching out to 6,000 owners one by one
Generic email blasts with no segmentation
contrast_rows.after: 5 targeted sequences matched to each owner profile

contrast_rows.before: Replies go unanswered or take days to handle
contrast_rows.after: AI triages every reply and hands it to your team with a suggested response

contrast_rows.before: No visibility into who has been contacted or booked
contrast_rows.after: Every lead tracked from first touch to meeting booked

timeline_phases.name: Discovery & Data Prep
timeline_phases.description: Clean and enrich the 6,000-contact list using Regrid property data. Run Claude AI scoring to segment leads into 5 priority tiers. Deliver enriched CSV with scores.

timeline_phases.name: Build
timeline_phases.description: Configure 5 Instantly sequences with per-segment copy. Build N8N workflows for reply handling, Calendly routing, and re-engagement cron. Connect all integrations.

timeline_phases.name: Testing & Go-Live
timeline_phases.description: End-to-end testing of the full outreach flow. Campaign launch with warmup active. Handoff walkthrough and documentation delivered to Mitchel.

invoice_line_items.title: Property List Enrichment & AI Segmentation
invoice_line_items.description: Enrich 6,000 contacts with Regrid property data. Score and segment leads into 5 priority tiers using Claude AI.

invoice_line_items.title: Instantly Campaign Build (5 Sequences)
invoice_line_items.description: Build and configure 5 targeted email sequences in Instantly with per-segment copy, warmup, and A/Z testing.

invoice_line_items.title: N8N Automation & Calendly Integration
invoice_line_items.description: Reply triage workflow, Calendly booking integration, and 14-day re-engagement subsequence.

scope_deliverables: Property list enrichment for up to 6,000 contacts
Lead scoring model and 5-segment classification system
Instantly campaign setup with 5 sequence variants
N8N reply handling and routing workflow
out_of_scope: CRM setup or integration, ongoing campaign management after handoff, paid advertising, copywriting revisions beyond two rounds, any work outside the defined 6,000-contact list, and third-party tool subscription costs (Instantly, Regrid, N8N, Calendly billed directly to client).
client_responsibilities: Provide the full 6,000-contact list in CSV format within 3 days of project start
Provide access to an active Instantly account (or create one prior to kickoff)
Review and approve email copy before campaign launch
Respond to questions and review requests within 48 hours during the build phase
